summary: NITJ Venue Booking app with role-based access for Student Coordinators, Faculty, and Admin. Key fix in progress: when a Student Coordinator registers, all faculty accounts should receive an in-app bell notification to approve/reject the account. Once any faculty member acts, the coordinator's status updates and the notification resolves for others.
architectural_notes: Role-based system with at least three roles: Student Coordinator, Faculty, Admin
Student Coordinator accounts start in 'Pending Faculty Approval' status after registration
Any faculty member (not a specific one) can approve/reject a pending Student Coordinator account
known_issues: Faculty do not receive in-app notifications when a Student Coordinator registers and awaits approval — previous fix attempts (builds) failed twice

existing_features.title: In the NotificationsDashboard component, faculty users must see pending Student Coordinator approval notifications rendered with the coordinator's name, email, and Approve / Reject action buttons. When a faculty member approves or rejects, the coordinator's verification status must be updated and the notification must be marked as resolved (removed or dismissed) for all faculty accounts.

new_feature_requests.summary: When a Student Coordinator registers, send in-app bell notifications to all faculty accounts with Approve/Reject action; once any faculty acts, update coordinator status and resolve notification for others

When a Student Coordinator successfully registers (profile is created with role 'StudentCoordinator'), the backend must automatically create an in-app notification for every existing faculty account. The notification message must indicate that a new Student Coordinator account is pending approval, including the coordinator's name and email. This notification creation must happen inside the profile registration logic in the main actor.

Add or update a backend method (e.g., resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications) that, when any faculty member approves or rejects a pending Student Coordinator, removes or marks as resolved the corresponding verification-request notification for ALL faculty principals — not just the acting faculty member.
